candidate_lesson.lesson_text: A trade requiring a 56-day hold to realize its edge should be vetoed when 4 of 6 signal layers are ✗ — the macro thesis cannot survive that many days of contradicting price structure.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: The single closed loss shorted USDJPY on a rate_diff_z of -0.97 (weak macro) while HTF market structure was BULLISH, price was NOT at an OB/FVG zone, and there was NO CHOCH/BOS in trade direction. Institutionally, a 56-day cycle_divergence thesis needs price to eventually confirm; entering with structure actively against you means you pay carry/adverse-drift for weeks before the thesis has any chance to express — the stop gets hit first. The confluence count (✓ layers) is a proxy for how soon institutional flow aligns with the macro view.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if entry_context['hold_days_est'] > 30 and sum(1 for layer in signal_layers_active if layer.startswith('✓')) < 3: return ForexVeto  # long-horizon macro needs structural confirmation now
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Filters the exact loss configuration observed (avg R=-1.002); expected avgR uplift on long-hold FOREX entries, contributing toward Sharpe by cutting negative-R tail; est +0.01–0.02 Sharpe if it removes 1-in-3 of these entries.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: Only 1 closed trade (0W/1L, avgR=-1.002); zero trades in the last 7 days. The single loss had hold_days_est=56 and a size_modifier of only 0.118 — the system itself flagged low conviction yet still entered.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_reasoning: The lone loss: rate_diff_z=-0.968 (|z|<1.0, weak), 4 of 6 signal_layers_active marked ✗ (HTF bias contradicting, no OB/FVG, no CHOCH/BOS), hold_days_est=56, macro_conviction=0.405 — a low-conviction long-horizon short with price structure explicitly against it produced -1.002R.
candidate_lesson.reasoning_component_targeted: signal_layers_active (✓/✗ confluence count) gated jointly with entry_context.hold_days_est

reflection.system_health_note: System is effectively flat (0 trades in 7 days, regime UNKNOWN, forex flagged NO_TRADE_TODAY, TV internal-only at 75% sizing) with only a single closed loss on record — insufficient sample to move Sharpe yet, so priority is protecting against low-confluence long-hold entries rather than adding complexity.
